content:
## ✅ CBSE Class 12 Mathematics Prediction Papers — COMPLETED

I've successfully created all **3 prediction papers** for the 2027 board exam. Here's a summary of the work:

### Reference Papers Analyzed
- **SQP 2025-26** (Maths-SQP.pdf + Maths-MS.pdf) — Full text extracted and analyzed
- **2026 Board Paper** (65-1-1) — Full text extracted and analyzed
- **2024 Board Paper** (65_1_1) — Reviewed for pattern confirmation

### Format Confirmed (exactly matching SQP)
| Section | Questions | Type | Marks Each | Total | Internal Choice |
|---------|-----------|------|------------|-------|-----------------|
| A | Q1–18 MCQs + Q19–20 Assertion-Reason | MCQ / A-R | 1 | 20 | None |
| B | Q21–25 | VSA | 2 | 10 | 2 questions |
| C | Q26–31 | SA | 3 | 18 | 3 questions |
| D | Q32–35 | LA | 5 | 20 | 2 questions |
| E | Q36–38 | Case Study | 4 (1+1+2 or 2+2) | 12 | 1 sub-part in 2 Qs |
| **Total** | **38** | | | **80** | |

### Files Created

1. **`D:\Study Papers\Jeffrey\Mathematics\Prediction Papers\Maths_Prediction_Paper_1.md`** (14.5 KB)
   - Focus areas: Inverse trig (domain/properties), Matrix algebra & systems of equations, Continuity & differentiability (first principles), Integration (partial fractions, definite integrals), Differential equations (linear, homogeneous), Vectors (cross product, projection), 3D Geometry (shortest distance between lines), LPP, Probability (Bayes' theorem)
   - Case studies: Matrix-based allocation, LPP (manufacturing), Bayes' theorem (hospitals)

2. **`D:\Study Papers\Jeffrey\Mathematics\Prediction Papers\Maths_Prediction_Paper_2.md`** (13.6 KB)
   - Focus areas: Relations (equivalence), Inverse trig (principal values), Determinant properties, Parametric differentiation, Rolle's theorem, Optimization (ellipse), Integration (absolute value functions, partial fractions), Differential equations (linear & homogeneous), 3D Geometry (equation of plane), LPP, Probability (conditional & Bayes')
   - Case studies: Pool optimization (perimeter/area), LPP (farming), Bayes' theorem (factory)

3. **`D:\Study Papers\Jeffrey\Mathematics\Prediction Papers\Maths_Prediction_Paper_3.md`** (13.8 KB)
   - Focus areas: Relations (reflexive/symmetric/transitive), Inverse trig identities, Matrix equations ($A^2 = I$), Determinant properties (sum/product), Logarithmic differentiation ($x^x$), Optimization (cylindrical can), Integration ($\log \sin x$, area of triangles), Differential equations (homogeneous), 3D Geometry (image of point in line), LPP, Probability (independence & conditional)
   - Case studies: Running track optimization, Wire cutting optimization, Probability (independence)

### Key Design Principles
- Each paper uses **different questions and different topic emphasis** — no repeats across papers
- All papers follow the **exact CBSE SQP format** with proper section headers, mark distribution, and internal choice patterns
- Mathematical notation uses **LaTeX** for clean rendering
- Questions are at **appropriate CBSE board difficulty** — not too easy, not impossibly hard
- **Case study questions** are realistic, application-based scenarios as per CBSE pattern
- Internal choice (OR) questions follow the exact same distribution as the SQP
